title: Medical English — Clinical Register
description: Differential diagnosis, patient history, informed consent, clinical handover.
summary_pt_br: Inglês clínico: 'The patient presents with', 'differential diagnosis', 'informed consent', 'plan'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Differential diagnosis, patient history, informed consent, clinical handover.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Inglês clínico: 'The patient presents with', 'differential diagnosis', 'informed consent', 'plan'.

scenes.text_en: Differential diagnosis, patient history, informed consent, clinical handover. Focus: medical english — clinical register. The patient presents with acute chest pain.
scenes.text_pt: Inglês clínico: 'The patient presents with', 'differential diagnosis', 'informed consent', 'plan'. Foco: medical english — clinical register. O paciente apresenta dor torácica aguda.

scenes.title: Medical English — Clinical Register
scenes.body_en: Key patterns: 'The patient presents with...', 'Differential diagnosis includes...', 'Informed consent was obtained.', 'Plan: admit for observation.'
scenes.body_pt: Inglês clínico: 'The patient presents with', 'differential diagnosis', 'informed consent', 'plan'.

examples.en: The patient presents with acute chest pain.
examples.pt: O paciente apresenta dor torácica aguda.

examples.en: Differential diagnosis includes MI and pulmonary embolism.
examples.pt: Diagnóstico diferencial inclui IAM e embolia pulmonar.

examples.en: Informed consent was obtained prior to the procedure.
examples.pt: Consentimento informado obtido antes do procedimento.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Medical English — Clinical Register

exercise.question: Complete: "The patient ___ with acute chest pain."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The patient presents with acute chest pain."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O paciente apresenta dor torácica aguda.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Differential diagnosis includes MI and pulmonary embolism.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Differential diagnosis includes MI and pulmonary embolism."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Diagnóstico diferencial inclui IAM e embolia pulmonar.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Medical English — Clinical Register — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre medical english — clinical register. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Maya, present this patient in clinical English.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The patient presents with acute chest pain.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Admit for observation and troponin labs.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Stable, pending labs, monitored on telemetry.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Medical English demands clarity under pressure.

scenes.title: The teaching round
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Present a patient case. Use at least three clinical phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On early morning rounds, Maya shadowed a senior physician who presented each patient in crisp clinical English.

paragraphs.speaker: Doctor
paragraphs.en: The patient presents with acute chest pain and shortness of breath over the last three hours.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Differential diagnosis includes myocardial infarction, pulmonary embolism, and musculoskeletal pain.

paragraphs.speaker: Doctor
paragraphs.en: Informed consent was obtained for the cardiac catheterization scheduled at noon today.

paragraphs.speaker: Doctor
paragraphs.en: Plan: admit for observation, serial troponins, and cardiology consult within the hour.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Clinical English, Maya learned, is a dialect of absolute precision forged across millions of hospital handovers.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Medical English — Clinical Register". Differential diagnosis, patient history, informed consent, clinical handover. The patient presents with acute chest pain. Differential diagnosis includes MI and pulmonary embolism. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Medical English — Clinical Register". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Medical English — Clinical Register".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Medical English — Clinical Register".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
